Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Russet Oxide

This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 0 gp 1 sp 0 cp

Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 5

How much?
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2002 at 11:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758514208
47 posts
How much does this sell for?
▲ Page top
RE: How much?
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2002 at 1:02 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Ok Rodcet nife, the bazaar is full of this stuff for sale at 2pp each.

This is what spawns instead of IRON oxide sometimes at the spawn points in steamfont. Since the IRON oxide is in very high demand, the spawns are stripped pretty quickly each time they pop. The iron oxides sell fast, for hundreds of plat, leaving the people with a bunch of russett oxide that nobody really wants.
▲ Page top
RE: How much?
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2002 at 3:35 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
Iron oxide sells for around 900pp each in the bazaar on teh Ayonae Ro sever.

It also rarely drops from fire elementals in Nagina (or however that is spelled) The dungeon reached in the SE corner of lavastorm.
▲ Page top
I am getting Quite POed
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2002 at 10:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591775643580
50 posts
Steamfont used to be my favorite newbie hunting ground till this started dropping and the fat heads came to town killing EVERY SPAWN between the mino caves and the mills.
▲ Page top
Ummm..
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2002 at 1:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252770658
242 posts
Ok I started a gnome Mage and thought it would be fun to do the armor quest. Well I need this and cant find it anywhere. So I come to here and it drops in the Hole of all places! GREAT! So now I cant get the foot part because of this. Im sure someone will be willing to sell it to me for 50pp or more, but since Im Lvl 10 now and have a total of 4 pp in the bank...Well you can figure out the rest. Oh did I mention that you need Cloth armor not small cloth for the quest.

So di I seem agitated, Yeah? Good only spent 5 hours trying to find the items I need only to get, Dosent combine with small armor pieces :)

Well I guess the jokes on me. Thanks Verant.
▲ Page top
RE: Ummm..
QuoteReply
# May 31 2004 at 11:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760379873
7 posts
I am going through the same frustration with finding this item as well. Level 14 gnome mage and wonder also why if this is newbie armor that the drops have to be this rare? The concepted posed by Twinkman ... err..Wynkman says that if you have the pp and other chars ...newbie quests can be ignored. Also if you have to keep returning to find these rare drops until you have already outgrown the armor, why bother putting it in the game. Sadly, extremists like Wynkman think only that we want to be level 60 tomorrow and that was not the point of discussion.
▲ Page top
RE: Ummm..
QuoteReply
# Apr 23 2004 at 9:26 PM Rating: Default
Wynkman
32 posts
I have seven characters currently, and have finished 6 of these newbie armor quests. ALL QUESTS have one or 2 very rare components for the chest piece and weapon, much like some of the high-end tradeskills. I believe Verant did that to increase the satisfaction in completion of the quest. You can be glad that the combines are no-fail, unlike the high-end tradeskils. Ask this question of your self; If everthing was easy and therefore the challenge was completely removed, how much FUN would you have? HoHumm, I made a druid. HoHumm, tomorrow I'm lvl 60. Yawn.
▲ Page top
Another source
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2002 at 9:30 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592341527836
Scholar
188 posts
Is an uncommon ground spawn near the mino caves in steamfront. If you see something on the ground, it will be one of a few things when you pick it up, this being one of them.
